items.title_en: Sarat Sethi is watching this 'Magnificent Seven' stock
items.title_zh: 萨拉特·塞西（Sarat Sethi）正在关注这只“七雄”股票
items.desc_en: Amazon shows signs of growth as it continues to expand its businesses, Sarat Sethi said on CNBC's "The Exchange."
items.desc_zh: 萨拉特·塞西 (Sarat Sethi) 在 CNBC 的“The Exchange”节目中表示，随着业务的不断扩展，亚马逊显示出了增长的迹象。

items.title_en: Lyse Doucet: Under fragile ceasefire, Iranians wonder if US deal can be done
items.title_zh: Lyse Doucet：在脆弱的停火下，伊朗人想知道美国是否可以达成协议
items.desc_en: The BBC's chief international correspondent reports from Iran as diplomatic efforts to avoid a return to war intensify.
items.desc_zh: 英国广播公司（BBC）首席国际记者从伊朗报道称，避免战争重燃的外交努力正在加强。

items.title_en: Goldman Sachs bond traders stumbled as Wall Street rivals thrived: 'A fire is being lit under' them
items.title_zh: 高盛债券交易员跌跌撞撞，而华尔街竞争对手却蓬勃发展：“他们的底下正在点燃一把火”
items.desc_en: Goldman's identity as a trader's firm — one expected to perform in turbulent markets — makes any stumble in the division notable.
items.desc_zh: 高盛作为交易商公司的身份——预计将在动荡的市场中表现出色——使得该部门的任何失误都引人注目。

items.title_en: Jury finds that Ticketmaster and Live Nation had an anticompetitive monopoly over big concert venues
items.title_zh: 陪审团发现 Ticketmaster 和 Live Nation 对大型音乐会场地存在反竞争垄断
items.desc_en: A jury has found the concert giant had a harmful monopoly over big concert venues, dealing the company a loss over claims brought by dozens of U.S. states.
items.desc_zh: 陪审团发现，这家音乐会巨头对大型音乐会场地存在有害的垄断，导致该公司在美国数十个州提起的索赔中蒙受损失。

items.title_en: Fans overcharged by $1.72 each by 'monopoly' Ticketmaster owner
items.title_zh: “垄断”Ticketmaster 所有者向每名粉丝多收 1.72 美元
items.desc_en: The lawsuit said the firm's practices had led to higher ticket prices and worse service for customers.
items.desc_zh: 诉讼称，该公司的做法导致票价上涨和客户服务恶化。

items.title_en: Cattle prices soar to record highs as grilling season heats up
items.title_zh: 随着烧烤季节的升温，牛肉价格飙升至历史新高
items.desc_en: Cattle futures contracts have jumped more than 25% over the past 12 months as ranchers face rising costs and cut the size of herds.
items.desc_zh: 由于牧场主面临成本上涨和减少牛群规模，过去 12 个月牛期货合约上涨了 25% 以上。

items.title_en: Ford EV leader leaving automaker amid new restructuring efforts
items.title_zh: 福特电动汽车领导者在新的重组努力中离开汽车制造商
items.desc_en: The departure was announced alongside Ford detailing a new restructuring that includes the establishment of a "Product Creation and Industrialization" unit.
items.desc_zh: 福特宣布离职的同时，还详细介绍了新的重组计划，其中包括建立“产品创造和工业化”部门。

items.title_en: Lumen Technology's high-stakes fiber bet nearly bankrupted it. Now, it's powering its AI future
items.title_zh: Lumen Technology 的高风险光纤投资几乎使其破产。现在，它正在为人工智能的未来提供动力
items.desc_en: AI's voracious demand for computing power is putting Lumen Technologies in a sweet spot. The one-time penny stock could soar as data use surges.
items.desc_zh: 人工智能对计算能力的巨大需求使 Lumen Technologies 处于有利位置。随着数据使用量的激增，这种一次性低价股可能会飙升。

items.title_en: Regulators are reportedly zeroing in on suspicious trades ahead of market-moving Trump post
items.title_zh: 据报道，在特朗普发表影响市场的言论之前，监管机构正在重点关注可疑交易
items.desc_en: The information sought includes so-called Tag 50 identifiers, which can be used to determine who was behind the trades.
items.desc_zh: 寻求的信息包括所谓的 Tag 50 标识符，可用于确定交易背后的人员。

items.title_en: Iran war damaged as much as $58 billion of energy infrastructure, Rystad estimates
items.title_zh: Rystad 估计，伊朗战争对能源基础设施造成的损失高达 580 亿美元
items.desc_en: It could take years to repair damaged energy infrastructure in the Middle East and restore production to pre-war levels.
items.desc_zh: 修复中东受损的能源基础设施并将生产恢复到战前水平可能需要数年时间。

items.title_en: Prominent Palestinian prisoner Marwan Barghouti assaulted three times in a month, family says
items.title_zh: 巴勒斯坦著名囚犯马尔万·巴尔古提 (Marwan Barghouti) 一个月内遭到三次袭击，家人称

items.title_en: Chinese national given one year in prison for smuggling ants out of Kenya
items.title_zh: 中国公民因从肯尼亚走私蚂蚁被判入狱一年
items.desc_en: Zhang Kequn was arrested in March while trying to travel to China with more than 2,000 live ants.
items.desc_zh: 张克群3月份在试图携带2000多只活蚂蚁前往中国时被捕。

items.title_zh: Snapchat 老板裁员 1000 人，称人工智能将减少重复性工作
items.desc_en: The Snapchat owner is laying off around 16% of staff and withdrawn hundreds of open job roles.
items.desc_zh: Snapchat 所有者将解雇约 16% 的员工，并撤回数百个空缺职位。

items.title_zh: 随着基准接近历史高点，标准普尔 500 指数走高：实时更新
items.desc_en: The S&P 500 ended Tuesday's session less than 1% from its all-time high set on Jan. 28.
items.desc_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数周二收盘时较 1 月 28 日创下的历史高点下跌不到 1%。

items.title_en: Struggling shoe retailer Allbirds makes bizarre pivot from shoes to AI, stock explodes more than 300%
items.title_zh: 陷入困境的鞋类零售商 Allbirds 奇异地从鞋子转向人工智能，股价暴涨超过 300%
items.desc_en: Allbirds announced a deal with American Exchange Group to sell its intellectual property and other assets for $39 million in March.
items.desc_zh: 3 月份，Allbirds 宣布与美国交易集团 (American Exchange Group) 达成协议，以 3900 万美元的价格出售其知识产权和其他资产。

items.title_en: Trump threatens to fire Fed chair Powell if he doesn't leave in May
items.title_zh: 特朗普威胁美联储主席鲍威尔，如果他五月份不离开就解雇他
items.desc_en: Donald Trump's threat marks the latest escalation in his ongoing spat with Jerome Powell.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普的威胁标志着他与杰罗姆·鲍威尔的持续争执的最新升级。

items.title_en: Trump threatens to fire Powell if the Fed chair doesn't leave office on his own
items.title_zh: 特朗普威胁称，如果鲍威尔不自行离任，他将解雇鲍威尔
items.desc_en: Though most Fed chairs in the past have left after being replaced, Powell has demurred on what he plans to do.
items.desc_zh: 尽管过去大多数美联储主席在被替换后都离开了，但鲍威尔对他的计划提出了异议。

items.desc_zh: 目前还没有官方确认谁被杀或袭击者发生了什么事。

items.desc_zh: 该旅游平台表示，它已更改 Pin 图以保护客户，但未透露有多少人受到影响。

items.title_en: Trump's rift with Pope is playing out in public - it's costing him valuable support

items.title_zh: 谷歌将惩罚利用后退按钮欺骗用户的网站
items.desc_en: The tech giant said it will punish sites that block back button navigation from June.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，将从 6 月份开始惩罚屏蔽后退按钮导航的网站。

items.title_en: South Africa names apartheid-era politician as new ambassador to the US
items.title_zh: 南非任命种族隔离时代政治家为新驻美国大使
items.desc_en: Roelf Meyer played a key role as a negotiator during talks to end white-minority rule in South Africa.
items.desc_zh: 罗尔夫·迈耶在结束南非白人少数统治的谈判中作为谈判代表发挥了关键作用。

items.title_en: Magyar meets Hungarian president as Trump says next PM 'a good man'
items.title_zh: 马扎尔会见匈牙利总统，特朗普称下一任总理是“好人”
items.desc_en: The man who ended Viktor Orbán's 16 years of continuous rule, Péter Magyar, is calling for a speedy transfer of power.
items.desc_zh: 结束维克托·欧尔班 16 年连续统治的人彼得·马扎尔 (Péter Magyar) 呼吁迅速移交权力。

items.title_en: Australia's richest person must share part of her mining fortunes, court rules
items.title_zh: 法院规定，澳大利亚首富必须分享部分矿业财富
items.desc_en: The long-running legal dispute is over a lucrative iron ore project in the top west corner of Australia.
items.desc_zh: 这场长期的法律纠纷是围绕澳大利亚西北部一个利润丰厚的铁矿石项目展开的。
